seoTitle: Blue Haven vs Blue Knob — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Blue Haven and Blue Knob. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Blue Haven vs Blue Knob: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Blue Haven and Blue Knob.
heading: Blue Haven vs Blue Knob — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Blue Haven, New South Wales and Blue Knob, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Blue Knob has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Blue Haven (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Blue Haven or Blue Knob safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Blue Haven has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Blue Knob scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Blue Haven scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Blue Knob scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Blue Haven or Blue Knob?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Blue Knob has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
